summary: Full backend + frontend regression + new P1/P2 batch verification for ForgeSlicer. Backend: 49/49 prior pytest pass + 16/16 new P1 tests pass (verified field default false, 9 expanded categories accept + misc fallback, /verify endpoint 403 gate). Frontend: COMPOSITES Slot primitive, 4-dialog refactor, 13/14 category options in SaveComponent/Gallery, tag-pill click → search → /api/components?q= network call, verified badge absent (correct). All P1 + P2 acceptance criteria met. One backend code-review nit found re: components list sort order missing verified-first key (printers endpoint has it, components does not).

minor.issue: Sort order is [('votes',-1),('created_at',-1)] — does NOT include ('verified',-1) as first key despite review request specifying 'verified desc, votes desc, created_at desc'. /api/printers correctly uses the 3-key sort. Currently has no functional impact because no items are verified, but will mis-order once admin verifies any component.

test_results.backend_p1_verified_default_false: PASS — POST /api/components returns verified:false; GET /api/components every item has verified:bool
test_results.backend_p1_expanded_categories: PASS — all 9 new categories (fasteners, electronics, brackets, hinges, gears, decorative, organizers, miniatures, structural) accepted; unknown 'totallybogus_xyz' falls back to misc; legacy mechanical/rack/mounting/misc still work
test_results.backend_p1_verify_gate: PASS — POST /api/components/{cid}/verify returns 403 'Admin allowlist not configured' both unauthenticated and with bogus Bearer token (gate runs before auth)
test_results.backend_regression_full_suite: PASS — 49/49 existing tests still pass (test_voice_command::test_boolean_subtract is currently green; no deselect needed this run)
test_results.frontend_composites_slot: PASS — COMPOSITES section visible; add-slot-negative-btn + add-slot-positive-btn present; click adds exactly 3 scene-tree-items (1 cube + 2 cylinders) + 1 group-slot-* node (group-slot-mpc3ufl5-xhpng observed)
test_results.frontend_dialogs_after_split: PASS — all 4 dialogs open after Dialogs.jsx → dialogs/*.jsx refactor: share-dialog, save-component-dialog, orca-dialog, save-printer-dialog
test_results.frontend_gallery_14_filter_options: PASS — Components tab shows 14 options (All categories + 13 above)
test_results.frontend_tag_pills_and_search_wiring: PASS — component-tags-* group present, component-tag-pill-* render (3 pills observed). Clicking pill populated search input to 'minirack' AND fired GET /api/components?q=minirack
test_results.frontend_verified_badge_absent: PASS — component-verified-* count = 0 across all rendered cards (no items currently verified)
test_results.frontend_auth_anon_regression: PASS — login-btn present, user-menu-trigger absent on anonymous

action_items: (Minor) Fix GET /api/components sort order in /app/backend/server.py line 613 — change `.sort([('votes',-1),('created_at',-1)])` to `.sort([('verified',-1),('votes',-1),('created_at',-1)])` to match the documented behaviour and the /api/printers pattern. Non-blocking because no items are verified yet.
critical_code_review_comments: Components list sort mismatch (see action_items) — documentation/PR says verified-first but code does not include the verified key. Trivial 1-line fix.

ADMIN_EMAILS gate on POST /api/components/{cid}/verify correctly runs BEFORE auth check, so the endpoint 403s with the clear 'Admin allowlist not configured' message even for unauthenticated callers — good defensive default.
_normalize_category() with .lower().strip() + set membership cleanly handles the 9-new-category expansion and any unknown input drops to misc — works as advertised.

Dialogs.jsx refactor into 4 files preserves all existing data-testid IDs (share-dialog, save-component-dialog, orca-dialog, save-printer-dialog) — no regression. Note printer dialog testid is `save-printer-dialog` (review request mentioned both `printer-dialog` and `save-printer-dialog`; the actual testid is `save-printer-dialog`).
store.addSlot() creates 3 children + a single group with testid `group-slot-*` as advertised; clean composite implementation.
test_credentials: Not needed for this iteration — all flows tested either anonymously or via direct API. Phase 2 auth seeding (mongosh per /app/memory/test_credentials.md) still works; confirmed login-btn shows for anon and user-menu-trigger is absent.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates and cleans up TEST_iter11_* components in /api/components (16 ephemeral docs, all deleted in same test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1+P2 features verified working. The only outstanding nit is the minor /api/components sort order missing verified-first key — described in action_items. New regression file /app/backend/tests/test_components_p1.py (16 tests) covers verified default, 9 new categories, unknown→misc fallback, and the admin-gate. Reuse it for future iterations.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; one minor spec-vs-code drift on the components sort order documented above.
